### What Fallow finds

| Category | Examples |
|----------|---------|
| Unused files | Files not imported from any entry point |
| Unused exports | Named exports with 0 references |
| Unused types | Interfaces and type aliases never imported |
| Unused dependencies | Packages in package.json never used |
| Circular dependencies | Import cycles between modules |
| Code duplication | Repeated code blocks across files |
